name: Open Forum
summary: An app for organizing meaningful and engaging discussions, increasing students' sense of belongingness on campus
overview: Semester-long group project for Human-Computer Interaction consisting of a full UX research process to create a mobile app solution to support belongingness on campus

name: Snakebite Data Story Poster
summary: Raising awareness about the link between climate and snakebite
overview: As the second project from my Information Design studio, I needed to create a data story poster about the global snakebite crisis. This poster captures the link between different climate conditions and countries with high rates of snakebite.

name: Marketing Analytics Co-op @ Boston Beer
summary: Applying UX research and design thinking to translate marketing data into clear and engaging insights for a non-technical audience
overview: As the sole designer on the Marketing Analytics team, I created scorecards and Power BI dashboards to deliver clear insights on advertising performance to the brand marketing teams

name: Snakebite Response Poster
summary: An illustrated guide to snakebite prevention for Batswana of all ages
overview: A poster and wallet card set for preventing snakebite in Botswana. The first of two projects for my Information Design studio.

name: Cooper Co-op Review Platform @ Sandbox
summary: Helping Northeastern students make more informed co-op searching decisions
overview: Leading the design side of the creation of a Northeastern co-op review platform

name: Dissonant Harmony
summary: Using type and form to convey "dissonant harmony" in Alexander Calder's "Big Crinkly"
overview: Marketing material for an Alexandar Calder museum exhibition. Includes an A1 size poster, A5 size flyer, and Instagram posts.

name: ALI Hacks
summary: Professional yet original internal portal UI and sponsorship package for a Boston-based, student-led hackathon
overview: An internal application portal for a Boston student-led hackathon and a sponsorship package to send out to potential sponsors.

name: Rockumentary
summary: A recital poster that balances notes of rock and nostalgia
overview: A poster for my friend's British-rock-themed senior recital at Berklee College of Music

name: Radien
summary: A ticket-tracking system for project management and ease in handoff of work between teams
overview: A six-week long UI/UX research and design group project for Radien, as part of the User-Experience Design course.
